overall.description: First-person exploration of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at dusk, featuring neon-lit buildings, passing vehicles, and pedestrians. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing detailed urban architecture with Japanese-inspired signage and futuristic elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street corner with neon signage

events.description: large armored truck drives past from right to left across the intersection
ego turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk, observing the cyberpunk cityscape and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large armored truck driving across the intersection from right to left
bald man in tank top walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall blue electrical utility box with warning labels and metallic finish
multi-story building with green-tinted windows and glowing neon signs
tall digital billboards displaying pink and blue neon advertisements
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting neon lights and building facades
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a cyberpunk city corner with wet streets reflecting neon lights. A large armored truck passes through the intersection while the camera walks forward, passing a blue utility box and approaching pedestrians on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath overhead transit structure with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside a graffiti-covered wall, following the curved sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in yellow jacket walking ahead on the right side of the path
woman in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overhead transit structure with red neon trim
concrete wall covered in colorful cyberpunk-style graffiti and murals
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street below
glowing red neon tubes running along the underside of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass structure illuminated by red neon pipes. The right side features an extensive graffiti wall while pedestrians walk ahead, and the street runs parallel on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching major intersection with corporate signage

events.description: KIROSHI corporate sign becomes clearly visible ahead as the overpass ends

agents.ego_description: approaching the KIROSHI building while walking along the street vendor area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light blue shirt walking on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red building with circular KIROSHI logo and Japanese text signage
small vendor stalls and shops lining the right sidewalk
green street sign with white text reading MOORE suspended over the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to reveal the KIROSHI building ahead with its distinctive circular logo. The camera walks past street vendors on the right while approaching the Moore Street intersection marked by a green overhead sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: ego steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection
black sedan drives past on the left while ego is crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at Moore street, navigating through other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in brown jacket and green pants crossing the street toward camera
black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red WALK text painted on asphalt
elevated pedestrian bridge with glass sides crossing above the intersection
open intersection space with multiple crossing paths and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing the wide Moore Street intersection on the yellow-striped crosswalk. Multiple pedestrians cross in different directions while a black sedan drives past, and an overhead pedestrian walkway spans above the street against the backdrop of towering cyberpunk buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city corner through a sheltered urban underpass and into a wide, bustling metropolitan intersection. It begins at a rain-soaked street corner where an armored truck passes through the intersection, moving forward past a blue utility box and oncoming pedestrians. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass illuminated by red neon pipes and lined with extensive graffiti. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the shelter, passing street vendors and approaching the KIROSHI building and the green overhead signage of Moore Street. Finally, the movement culminates in crossing the wide intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a black sedan beneath a towering pedestrian bridge and soaring cyberpunk skyscrapers.
